nodes.label: Home Screen — Whisper Coach Bubble (Empty Ritual State)
nodes.description: Home screen active session variant with coach whisper bubble expanded. Header: 'SESIÓN ACTIVA', 'Estás en la zona.' Timer card partially visible (10:10 shown), quedan 46:50, 60min + 13min claridad. Finalizar sesión button. Coach whisper bubble overlays upper portion: avatar icon with 'Tu coach' label, message 'Tienes 3 elementos en tu ritual de hoy. ¿Te ayudo a repartirlos durante la sesión para aprovecharlos bien?' with teal CTA link 'Organizar mi ritual >'. Below whisper: 'Sin apps protegidas' with 'Activar' teal button. 'Tu ritual de hoy: 0 de 0 completadas' with 'Agregar al ritual de hoy' card. 'Recordatorios: 3 activos' section visible.
key_elements: Agregar al ritual de hoy card

nodes.label: Coach Whisper Bubble Component
nodes.description: Proactive coach message bubble appearing on the Home active session screen. Contains: green avatar icon, 'Tu coach' label, message body referencing 3 ritual elements and offering to distribute them across the session, and teal inline CTA 'Organizar mi ritual >' that triggers the schedule flow.

nodes.label: App Protection — Inactive State with Activar CTA
nodes.description: Protection bar in inactive state: shield icon with 'Sin apps protegidas' label and a teal 'Activar' pill button on the right. Contrasts with the active protection state shown in home-active-neutral.png.
